query:
SELECT
    ams.mode_s AS "entry!",
    COUNT(*) AS "count!"
FROM
    request_statistics rs
JOIN
    aircraft ai ON rs.aircraft_id = ai.aircraft_id
JOIN
    aircraft_mode_s ams ON ai.aircraft_mode_s_id = ams.aircraft_mode_s_id
WHERE
    rs.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY
    ams.mode_s
ORDER BY
    "count!" DESC
LIMIT 10
